lyrics.text: Idol on set alright look alive people
lyrics.translation: 我们的大明星来了，好了，看着台下的观众

lyrics.text: And we're live in 5 4 3 2
Welcome back to the land of r-reality
Wait, let`s get it again with a little more personality
lyrics.translation: 等等，我们再录一次，再加点情绪

lyrics.text: Welcome back to the land of r-reality
Great now, say I want the world to see the real me
lyrics.translation: 这次不错，照着我的说，说我想给世界展示一个真实的自己

lyrics.text: Don't eat, don't sleep, stay healthy
lyrics.translation: 不要多吃，别贪睡，保持健康

lyrics.text: And it isn't in the budget to get a ticket for your family
lyrics.translation: 让你的家人来看，无所谓，不占我们的预算

lyrics.text: I heard they hired us our own attorney
lyrics.translation: 我听说他们雇了自己人当律师

lyrics.text: No conflict of interest there, don't you worry
lyrics.translation: 这里没有利益冲突，别担心

lyrics.text: Look over there at the Hollywood sign
lyrics.translation: 你向窗外看看那巨大的好莱坞标志

lyrics.text: Sign, sign right there on the dotted line
lyrics.translation: 签个名吧，签在这条线这里

lyrics.text: Pretend you're dating. It's great for ratings
lyrics.translation: 对公众谎称你在约会某人，这能提高曝光率

lyrics.text: Look into the camera
America's waiting
Everything ain't always what it seems
to the La La Land that you see on your screen
lyrics.translation: 在你屏幕上浮现的世界，都是假的

lyrics.text: Everything ain't always what it seems
to the La La Land of reality
I feel a little under the weather
We got a pill from Beverly Hills that'll make you feel better
lyrics.translation: 我们从比弗利山庄给你买了药，你会感觉好点的

lyrics.text: No such thing as a winner or a loser
Everyone's a winner said Every producer
lyrics.translation: 我们都是赢家，每个制片人都这样说

lyrics.text: It ain't our call, it's America's honey
lyrics.translation: 我们说了不算，甜心，这得看美国的趋势

lyrics.text: It's not our decision, but your time is our money
lyrics.translation: 我们无法做决定，你的时间关系到我们的钱途

lyrics.text: We need more energy
We need more ratings
Dance for the camera
America's waiting
lyrics.translation: 整个美国都在等着看你呢

lyrics.text: Everything ain't always what it seems
to the La La Land that you see on your screen
lyrics.translation: 在你屏幕上浮现的世界，都是假的

lyrics.text: Everything ain't always what it seems
to the La La Land of reality
in the La La Land of reality
Lights and camera
Cut, that's me, Just like that like one, two, three
Take all of your clothes off please
We're gonna need 'em back for the finale
lyrics.translation: 在最后一幕你会穿上的

lyrics.text: Someone call security, and escort her out to the street
lyrics.translation: 叫保安来！护送她到街上

lyrics.text: You should probably call an Uber
It might be hard to get a taxi (taxi, taxi, taxi)
lyrics.translation: 这个时间可能很难打到车了

lyrics.text: Everything ain't always what it seems
to the La La Land that you see on your screen
lyrics.translation: 在你屏幕上浮现的世界，都是假的

lyrics.text: Everything ain't always what it seems
to the La La Land of reality
In the La La Land of reality
Don't believe everything that you read
lyrics.translation: 也不要相信你读到的新闻

lyrics.text: In the La La Land of reality
